hypotheses.title: IRP1 [4Fe-4S] Cluster Occupancy as Feeding-Entrained Iron-Redox Chronostat
hypotheses.connection: IRP1 [4Fe-4S] cluster occupancy →→ Dual feeding-entrained mechanism (iron supply + NAD+/NADH redox) →→ Diurnal IRE-mRNA regulation (Nadimpalli 2024 gap)
hypotheses.key_prediction: IRP1 holo/apo ratio oscillates ~2-3 fold over 24h in mouse liver; detectable by native gel aconitase assay; IRP2 KO mice show persistent ferritin/TfR1 oscillation driven by IRP1 alone

hypotheses.title: CISD2 [2Fe-2S] as Redox-Gated ER-Mitochondrial Calcium Timer (Forward Direction Only)
hypotheses.connection: CISD2 [2Fe-2S] at MAMs →→ Circadian NAD+/NADH redox oscillation modulates cluster state →→ ER-mitochondrial Ca2+ transfer oscillation
hypotheses.key_prediction: CISD2-roGFP2 fusion shows oscillating redox state in synchronized cells, phase-locked to mitochondrial Ca2+ oscillation; CISD2 KO alters Ca2+ oscillation amplitude

hypotheses.title: CIA Pathway as LIP/ROS-Responsive Circadian Gate for Cytoplasmic Fe-S Proteome
hypotheses.connection: CIAO3 LIP/ROS sensitivity (Maio & Rouault 2022) →→ Circadian LIP + ROS convergence →→ Daily gate for ~20 cytoplasmic Fe-S proteins (XPD, ABCE1, IRP1, POLD1)
hypotheses.key_prediction: CIAO3-CIA1/MMS19 co-IP strength oscillates at circadian timepoints in HepG2; XPD-dependent NER efficiency shows circadian variation

hypotheses.title: Frataxin-Gated Fe-S Assembly via Mitochondrial LIP in FTMT-Negative Tissues
hypotheses.connection: FTMT absence in liver mitochondria →→ Unbuffered mitochondrial LIP amplifies diurnal iron oscillation →→ Frataxin-dependent Fe-S assembly rate oscillation (Lill 2025 stoichiometry)
hypotheses.key_prediction: Mito-FerroGreen in synchronized HepG2 shows mitochondrial LIP oscillation exceeding cytoplasmic LIP; FXN-knockdown shows amplified amplitude

hypotheses.title: Conserved Fe-S Requirement in Clock Neurons — Drosophila to Mammalian SCN
hypotheses.connection: Mandilaras 2012 Drosophila Fe-S→circadian phenotype →→ Conserved metabolic requirement →→ Mammalian SCN NFS1 conditional KO abolishes behavioral rhythms
hypotheses.key_prediction: NFS1flox/flox × VIP-Cre-ERT2 mice lose free-running circadian locomotor rhythms after tamoxifen induction; PER2::Luc dampened in NFS1-deleted SCN slices
